description_long: This is a compact, retro-styled toaster with a rounded rectangular body finished in a pale yellow color and accented by a black base and metallic top. The front face features a prominent lever, a circular dial, and several small buttons, suggesting multiple toasting settings and functions. The top surface has two wide, parallel toast slots with metallic trim, suitable for standard bread slices. The sides are smooth and unadorned, while the back is plain with no visible controls or openings. The overall design is sleek and functional, with a blend of vintage and modern aesthetics. The materials appear to be primarily metal and plastic, with a glossy finish on the metallic parts and a matte look on the colored surfaces.
description: A compact, retro-style yellow toaster with metallic accents, dual toast slots, and multiple front-facing controls. Its rounded body and sleek finish give it a vintage yet modern look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth, pale yellow surface and a protruding knob and lever on the right.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main lever, a circular dial, several buttons, and a gauge, all set against the yellow body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with a smooth yellow surface and no visible controls.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, rounded yellow surface with no controls or openings.
attribute_control_knobs: One round metallic knob and one lever on the front, with several small round buttons; all are silver or black with no visible text.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, parallel toast slots on the top, metallic-edged, sized for standard bread slices.
